title: Upper bounds of nodal sets for solutions of bi-Laplace equations: II
summary: We investigate the upper bounds of nodal sets for solutions of bi-Laplace equations without using frequency functions which play an essential role in the study of nodal sets in the celebrated work by Logunov \cite{Lo18}. We obtain some delicate monotonicity and propagation of smallness results by Carleman estimates. A polynomial upper bound for the nodal sets of solutions is obtained.

AI.tldr: 通过Carleman估计而非频率函数方法，获得了双调和方程解零点集的多项式上界估计。
AI.motivation: 研究双调和方程解的零点集上界问题，传统方法依赖于频率函数（如Logunov的著名工作），本文寻求不使用频率函数的替代方法。
AI.techniques: 主要使用Carleman估计技术，获得精细的单调性结果和小性传播性质，避免了频率函数方法。
AI.main_theorems: 获得了双调和方程解零点集的多项式上界估计，建立了不依赖频率函数的零点集控制方法。
AI.significance: 为研究高阶椭圆方程零点集提供了新的技术路径，扩展了Logunov经典工作的适用范围，对理解偏微分方程解的几何性质有重要意义。

title: The Asymptotic Behaviour of Oldroyd-B Fluids is Almost Newtonian
summary: Consider a viscoelastic fluid of Oldroyd-B type. It is shown that its stress tensor $τ$ and its Newtonian deformation tensor $D(u)$ decay at the same rate, while the elastic part $\varepsilon=τ-2ωD(u)$ decays faster. As a consequence, the stress tensor of a viscoelastic fluid exhibits an almost Newtonian behaviour for large times.

AI.tldr: 证明了Oldroyd-B型粘弹性流体的应力张量τ与牛顿变形张量D(u)以相同速率衰减，而弹性部分ε=τ-2ωD(u)衰减更快，表明长时间下粘弹性流体表现出近似牛顿行为。
AI.motivation: 研究Oldroyd-B型粘弹性流体的长时间行为，探索应力张量、变形张量和弹性部分之间的衰减关系，理解粘弹性流体在长时间尺度下的渐近性质。
AI.techniques: 粘弹性流体理论分析，Oldroyd-B模型研究，衰减率比较分析，长时间渐近行为分析，应力张量分解技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 应力张量τ与牛顿变形张量D(u)以相同速率衰减；2. 弹性部分ε=τ-2ωD(u)衰减速率更快；3. 长时间下粘弹性流体表现出近似牛顿行为。
AI.significance: 揭示了粘弹性流体长时间行为的本质特征，为理解复杂流体的渐近性质提供了理论依据，对非牛顿流体力学和材料科学有重要理论意义。

title: Potential Theory of the Fractional-Logarithmic Laplacian: Global Regularity and Critical Compact Embeddings
summary: We develop a potential-theoretic and functional framework for the fractional--logarithmic Laplacian $(-Δ)^{s+\ln}$ and its inhomogeneous counterpart $(λI-Δ)^{s+\ln}$ with $λ>1$. Their inverses yield logarithmic analogues of the classical Riesz and Bessel potentials. We introduce the logarithmic Bessel kernel $K_{s+\ln}^λ$, derive explicit representations (including a Gamma-mixture formula and a Fourier--Bessel representation), and compute sharp pointwise asymptotics as $|x|\to0$ and $|x|\to\infty$, with explicit leading constants; in particular, the far-field profile and its prefactor are independent of $s$. We also establish a measure-level bridge between the homogeneous and inhomogeneous symbols, which yields $L^p$ regularity for global solutions of $(λI-Δ)^{s+\ln}u=f$ and $(-Δ)^{s+\ln}u=f$ and motivates the logarithmic Bessel spaces $\mathcal L^{p}_{s+\ln,λ}$. We relate these spaces to the classical Bessel scale and prove their equivalence to the logarithmic Bessel potential spaces of Opic and Trebels. As applications, we obtain endpoint embeddings into H"older-type spaces at the critical line $n=2sp$ and a compactness theory exhibiting a strict logarithmic gain, including compactness at the critical Sobolev exponent $p^*=\frac{np}{n-2sp}$ in the subcritical regime.

AI.tldr: 建立了分数-对数拉普拉斯算子及其非齐次形式的势论和函数空间框架，包括对数Bessel核的显式表示、渐近分析和空间等价性。
AI.motivation: 研究分数-对数拉普拉斯算子 $(-Δ)^{s+\ln}$ 及其非齐次形式 $(λI-Δ)^{s+\ln}$，这类算子结合了分数阶和对数阶导数，需要建立相应的势论框架和函数空间理论。
AI.techniques: 势论方法、Gamma混合公式、Fourier-Bessel表示、点态渐近分析、测度级桥接、函数空间理论、紧性理论。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 对数Bessel核 $K_{s+\ln}^λ$ 的显式表示和渐近分析；2) 齐次与非齐次符号间的测度级桥接；3) 对数Bessel空间 $\mathcal L^{p}_{s+\ln,λ}$ 的建立及其与经典Bessel尺度的关系；4) 临界线 $n=2sp$ 的端点嵌入和紧性理论。
AI.significance: 为分数-对数算子建立了系统的势论框架，推广了经典Riesz和Bessel势理论，在临界Sobolev指数处获得了严格的对数增益紧性，对椭圆型偏微分方程理论有重要贡献。

title: Multi-Species Keller--Segel Systems: Analysis, Pattern Formation, and Emerging Mathematical Structures
summary:
Chemotaxis systems of Keller--Segel type constitute one of the central mathematical frameworks for understanding aggregation phenomena in biological and ecological systems. Over the past decades, the theory has evolved from the classical single-species model to increasingly sophisticated multi-species and multi-signal formulations that capture competition, cooperation, antagonistic chemotaxis, and interactions with fluid environments.
  This article provides a comprehensive exposition of multi-species Keller--Segel systems and their mathematical structure. We review fundamental analytical results concerning local and global well-posedness, mechanisms of finite-time blow-up, and the role of critical mass and dimensionality. Particular emphasis is placed on how cross-diffusion, antagonistic interactions, logistic effects, and nonlinear production terms alter the qualitative behavior of solutions.
  We further examine the mathematical mechanisms underlying pattern formation, including diffusion-driven instabilities, bifurcation phenomena, and the emergence of spatial and spatiotemporal structures. Connections between analytical thresholds and observed nonlinear dynamics are highlighted, and the interplay between reaction kinetics, chemotactic sensitivity, and diffusion is discussed from a unifying perspective.
  By synthesizing classical results with recent developments, this survey aims to clarify the structural principles governing multi-species chemotaxis systems, identify common analytical techniques, and outline open problems that remain central to the field. The exposition is intended to serve both specialists and researchers entering the area of nonlinear partial differential equations and mathematical biology.

AI.tldr: 这是一篇关于多物种Keller-Segel趋化系统的综合性综述论文，系统总结了该领域的数学理论发展和分析结果。
AI.motivation: Keller-Segel趋化系统是理解生物和生态系统中聚集现象的核心数学框架，随着理论发展从经典单物种模型扩展到多物种、多信号系统，需要系统总结这些复杂系统的数学结构和分析结果。
AI.techniques: PDE分析技术，包括局部和全局适定性理论、有限时间爆破机制分析、临界质量和维数理论、交叉扩散分析、反应扩散系统稳定性分析、分岔理论、模式形成机制等。
AI.main_theorems: 综述了多物种Keller-Segel系统的基本分析结果：适定性理论、爆破条件、临界质量现象、模式形成机制（扩散驱动不稳定性、分岔现象）、交叉扩散和对抗相互作用对解行为的影响等。
AI.significance: 为非线性PDE和数学生物学领域提供了系统性的理论框架，阐明了多物种趋化系统的结构原理，总结了共同的分析技术，指出了该领域的开放问题，对理论和应用研究都有重要指导意义。

title: $\mathrm{L}^{2}$--convergence of the time-splitting scheme for nonlinear Dirac equation in 1+1 dimensions
summary: We study the time-splitting scheme for approximating solutions to the Cauchy problem of the nonlinear Dirac equation in 1+1 dimensions. Under the assumption that the initial data for the scheme are convergent in $\mathrm{L}^{2}(\mathbb{R})$, we prove that the approximate solutions constructed by the corresponding time-splitting scheme are strongly convergent in $\mathrm{C}([0,\infty);\mathrm{L}^{2}(\mathbb{R}))$ to the global strong solution of the nonlinear Dirac equation. To achieve this, we first establish the pointwise estimates for time-splitting solutions. Based on these estimates, a modified Glimm-type functional is carefully designed to show that it is uniformly bounded in time, which yields $\mathrm{L}^2$ stability estimates for the scheme. Furthermore, we prove that the set of time-splitting solutions is precompact in $\mathrm{C}([0,T];\mathrm{L}^{2}(\mathbb{R}))$ for any $T>0$. Finally, we show that the limit of any subsequence of the time-splitting solutions is the unique strong solution to the Cauchy problem of the nonlinear Dirac equation.

AI.tldr: 证明了非线性Dirac方程时间分裂格式在L²空间中的强收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究非线性Dirac方程数值解的收敛性，特别是时间分裂格式在1+1维Cauchy问题中的应用
AI.techniques: 时间分裂格式、点估计、改进的Glimm型泛函、L²稳定性估计、预紧性分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了时间分裂近似解在C([0,∞);L²(R))中强收敛到全局强解，建立了L²稳定性估计和预紧性
AI.significance: 为非线性Dirac方程的数值计算提供了理论保证，发展了时间分裂格式的收敛性分析框架

title: Limiting absorption principle for time-harmonic acoustic and electromagnetic scattering of plane waves from a bi-periodic inhomogeneous layer
summary: The Rayleigh expansion is widely used as a formal radiation condition in the analysis and numerical treatment of grating diffraction problems for incoming plane waves. However, the Rayleigh expansion does not always lead to uniqueness of open waveguide scattering problems, due to the existence of surface/guided waves (in other words, Bound States in the Continuum (BICs)) which exponentially decay in the direction perpendicular to the periodicity. In this paper we suppose that a bi-periodic inhomogeneous medium supports BICs at some real-valued incident wavenumber. Based on singular perturbation arguments, we justify the Limiting Absorption Principle (LAP) for both time-harmonic acoustic and electromagnetic scattering of plane waves from bi-periodic structures. Replacing the wavenumber $k$ with $k+iε$, we prove that the unique solution with $ε>0$ converges to a solution of the original diffraction problem that additionally satisfies an orthogonal identity. This constraint condition together with the classical Rayleigh expansion leads to a sharp radiation condition to ensure uniqueness of time-harmonic scattering of plane waves by BIC-supporting bi-periodic materials.

AI.tldr: 建立了支持连续谱束缚态的双周期结构中平面波散射的极限吸收原理，提出了确保唯一性的尖锐辐射条件。
AI.motivation: 在双周期结构衍射问题中，Rayleigh展开作为辐射条件通常能保证唯一性，但当介质支持连续谱束缚态（BICs）时，由于表面波/导波的存在，Rayleigh展开无法确保散射问题的唯一解。
AI.techniques: 采用奇异摄动方法，通过将波数k替换为k+iε引入小耗散，建立极限吸收原理（LAP），证明当ε→0+时解收敛到满足正交性条件的原问题解。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于支持BICs的双周期介质，极限吸收原理成立：当ε>0时唯一解收敛到满足正交性条件的原问题解；结合Rayleigh展开和正交约束条件，构造了确保平面波散射唯一性的尖锐辐射条件。
AI.significance: 解决了支持连续谱束缚态的双周期结构散射问题的唯一性难题，为这类复杂波导系统的理论分析和数值计算提供了严格的数学基础，对光子晶体、超材料等周期性结构的光学设计有重要应用价值。

title: Dispersion for the Schr{ö}dinger equation on the line with short-range array of delta potentials
summary: We study dispersive properties of the one-dimensional Schr{ö}dinger equation with a short-range array of delta interactions. More precisely, we consider the self-adjoint operator obtained by perturbing the free Laplacian on the line with a real-valued sequence of Dirac delta potentials and belonging to weighted ${\ell}$^1(Z) spaces. Under suitable decay assumptions on the coupling constants and in the absence of a zero-energy resonance, we establish the L^1 (R) $\rightarrow$ L^$\infty$ (R) dispersive estimate with decay rate |t|^{-1/2} for the associated Schr{ö}dinger group. The proof relies on a limiting absorption principle in weighted spaces, explicit representation of the resolvent kernel in terms of Jost solutions and Born series expansion of the Friedrichs extension of the perturbed operator.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有短程δ势阵列的一维薛定谔方程满足L^1→L^∞色散估计，衰减率为|t|^{-1/2}
AI.motivation: 研究一维薛定谔方程在短程δ势阵列扰动下的色散性质，这类模型在量子力学和波传播理论中具有重要应用，特别关注奇异势能对波传播衰减行为的影响
AI.techniques: 加权空间中的极限吸收原理、Jost解的显式表示、Born级数展开、Friedrichs延拓方法、加权ℓ^1空间分析
AI.main_theorems: 在耦合常数满足适当衰减条件且无零能共振的情况下，建立了关联薛定谔群的L^1(R)→L^∞(R)色散估计，衰减率为|t|^{-1/2}
AI.significance: 扩展了奇异势能下薛定谔方程的色散理论，为理解δ势阵列对波传播衰减的影响提供了严格数学基础，对量子散射理论和波动力学有重要意义

title: Besov regularity of solutions to the Dirichlet problem for the Bessel $(p,s)$-Laplacian
summary: We study the Dirichlet problem for a class of fractional $p$-Laplacian operators of order $s \in (0,1)$ defined through the Riesz fractional gradient, which differs fundamentally from the standard fractional $p$-Laplacian. Our analysis combines the framework of Lions-Calderón spaces, Besov embeddings, and an adaptation of Nirenberg's difference quotient method, originally developed by Savaré, to the fractional Riesz setting. As a main result, we establish global Besov regularity estimates for weak solutions. Concretely, in the superquadratic regime $p \geq 2$, we prove $u \in \dot{B}_{p,\infty}^{s+1/p}(Ω)$ for $s \in [\frac{1}{p'},1)$, and $u \in \dot{B}_{p,\infty}^{s+\frac{s}{p-1}}(Ω)$ for $s \in (0,\frac{1}{p'})$. In the subquadratic case $1<p<2$, we show $u \in \dot{B}_{p,\infty}^{s+1/2}(Ω)$ for $s \in [\frac{1}{2},1)$, and $u \in \dot{B}_{p,\infty}^{2s}(Ω)$ for $s \in (0,\frac12)$, with quantitative bounds depending on the source data.

AI.tldr: 建立了基于Riesz分数阶梯度的分数阶p-Laplace方程Dirichlet问题弱解的全局Besov正则性估计
AI.motivation: 研究基于Riesz分数阶梯度的分数阶p-Laplace算子的Dirichlet问题，这类算子与标准分数阶p-Laplace算子有本质区别，需要发展新的正则性理论
AI.techniques: 结合Lions-Calderón空间框架、Besov嵌入定理，并将Savaré发展的Nirenberg差分商方法推广到分数阶Riesz设置
AI.significance: 为基于Riesz分数阶梯度的分数阶p-Laplace方程建立了系统的正则性理论，推广了经典椭圆方程的正则性结果，为分数阶非线性偏微分方程分析提供了新工具

title: The Extra Vanishing Structure and Nonlinear Stability of Multi-Dimensional Rarefaction Waves: The Geometric Weighted Energy Estimates
summary: We study the resolution of discontinuous singularities in gas dynamics via multi-dimensional rarefaction waves. While the mechanism is well-understood in one spatial dimension, the rigorous construction in higher dimensions has remained a challenging open problem since Majda's proposal, primarily due to the characteristic nature of rarefaction fronts which leads to derivative losses in linearized estimates. In this paper, we establish the nonlinear stability of multi-dimensional rarefaction waves for the compressible Euler equations with ideal gas law. We prove that for initial data being small perturbations of the planar rarefaction wave in $H^s$ ($s > s_c$), there exists a unique global solution that converges asymptotically to the background rarefaction wave as $t \to \infty$. Our proof relies on a novel Geometric Weighted Energy Method (GWEM), which yields stable energy estimates without loss of derivatives in standard Sobolev spaces, overcoming the limitations of previous Nash-Moser schemes. A key ingredient is a detailed geometric description of the rarefaction wave fronts via the acoustical metric, where we identify a hidden extra vanishing structure in the top-order derivatives of the characteristic speed. This is the first paper in a series, providing the crucial a priori energy bounds. The existence of solutions and applications to the multi-dimensional Riemann problem will be addressed in the forthcoming companion paper.

AI.tldr: 首次建立了可压缩Euler方程多维稀疏波的非线性稳定性，克服了特征导数损失的长期难题
AI.motivation: 研究气体动力学中不连续奇点的多维稀疏波分解机制。一维情况已有充分理解，但Majda提出以来，多维情况因稀疏波前缘的特征性质导致线性化估计中的导数损失，成为长期未解决的开放问题
AI.techniques: 创新的几何加权能量方法(GWEM)，通过声学度量详细描述稀疏波前缘几何结构，识别特征速度高阶导数中的隐藏消失结构，在标准Sobolev空间中实现无导数损失的能量估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了理想气体状态方程可压缩Euler方程多维稀疏波的非线性稳定性：对于$H^s$($s>s_c$)空间中平面稀疏波的小扰动初值，存在唯一全局解，且渐近收敛到背景稀疏波
AI.significance: 这是多维稀疏波稳定性研究的突破性进展，克服了Nash-Moser方法的局限性，为多维Riemann问题的解决奠定基础，是系列论文中的首篇，提供了关键的先验能量估计

title: Conditional asymptotic stability of solitary waves of the Euler-Poisson system on the line
summary: We apply the idea of using a combination of virial inequalities and Kato smoothing, previously applied to NLS and generalized KdV pure power equations to Euler-Poisson: we assume that a solution remains very close for all times to a soliton in an appropriate space and then we prove an asymptotic convergence to a soliton for $t\to +\infty$.

AI.tldr: 将virial不等式与Kato光滑化结合的方法应用于Euler-Poisson方程，证明接近孤子解的渐近收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究Euler-Poisson方程解的长时间行为，特别是孤子解的稳定性问题。该方法先前已成功应用于NLS和广义KdV方程，现扩展至Euler-Poisson系统，旨在证明接近孤子解的解会渐近收敛到孤子。
AI.techniques: virial不等式与Kato光滑化方法的结合；孤子稳定性分析；渐近收敛性证明；适当的函数空间构造
AI.main_theorems: 假设解在适当空间中始终非常接近孤子解，则证明当$t\to +\infty$时解渐近收敛到某个孤子
AI.significance: 将NLS和KdV方程中成功的分析方法推广到Euler-Poisson系统，为这类方程的孤子稳定性理论提供新工具，深化对非线性色散方程长时间行为的理解

title: Existence and regularity for an entire Grushin-Choquard equation
summary:
We consider the following Choquard equation
  $$
  -Δ_γu + u = \left(d(z)^{-μ} \ast |u|^p\right)|u|^{p-2}u, \text{ in } \mathbb{R}^N,
  $$
  where $Δ_γ$ is the Grushin operator. For a suitable range of the parameter $p$ we prove the existence of a mountain pass solution of the equation. We also establish that the solutions belong to $L^q(\mathbb{R}^N)$ for all $q\in [2,\infty]$ and to $C^{0,α}_\mathrm{loc}(\mathbb{R}^N)$ for some $α\in (0,1)$.

AI.tldr: 证明了Grushin算子下Choquard方程的山路解存在性及其正则性
AI.motivation: 研究Grushin算子（一种退化椭圆算子）框架下的Choquard方程，这类方程在量子力学和凝聚态物理中有重要应用，特别是在非均匀介质中的非线性现象
AI.techniques: 山路引理、变分方法、Hardy-Littlewood-Sobolev不等式、Grushin空间的函数空间理论、正则性估计
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在参数p的适当范围内证明山路解的存在性；2. 证明解属于所有L^q空间（q∈[2,∞]）；3. 证明解具有局部Hölder连续性
AI.significance: 将Choquard方程的研究推广到Grushin算子框架，为退化椭圆算子下的非线性非局部问题提供了新的理论结果，扩展了变分方法在非均匀空间中的应用

title: On spiral steady flows for the Couette-Taylor problem
summary: We investigate the Couette-Taylor problem for a steady incompressible viscous fluid in a 3D cylindrical annulus, where one of the two cylinders is still, under both Dirichlet and boundary conditions involving the vorticity that naturally appear in the weak formulation. The outcome of this study is twofold. First, we explicitly determine all the solutions with a specific geometric \emph{partial invariance}, which coincide with the so-called spiral Poiseuille or Poiseuille-Couette flows depending on the boundary conditions. Second, for small boundary data, we provide stability of such solutions, that is, no steady finite-energy perturbations are admissible. To achieve this result in presence of vorticity boundary conditions, we find a substantial analytical difference depending on which cylinder is still.

AI.tldr: 研究3D圆柱环中Couette-Taylor问题的稳态解及其稳定性，特别关注涡量边界条件的影响
AI.motivation: 研究三维圆柱环中不可压缩粘性流体的Couette-Taylor问题，其中一个圆柱静止，考虑Dirichlet边界条件和弱形式中自然出现的涡量边界条件
AI.techniques: 使用部分不变性几何结构分析，研究螺旋Poiseuille流和Poiseuille-Couette流，通过小边界数据扰动分析稳定性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 显式确定所有具有特定几何部分不变性的解；2. 对小边界数据证明这些解的稳定性（无稳态有限能量扰动）
AI.significance: 揭示了涡量边界条件下哪个圆柱静止对稳定性有重要影响，为Couette-Taylor问题的理论分析提供了新视角

title: Well-posedness of the heat equation in domains with topological transitions
summary: We analyze a linear parabolic equation with homogeneous Dirichlet boundary conditions posed in domains whose evolution may involve topological transitions. The domains are described as sublevel sets of a smooth space-time level set function, allowing for transitions such as domain splitting and merging and the creation or vanishing of islands and holes. We introduce anisotropic space-time function spaces that extend the classical Bochner spaces used in cylindrical domains and establish key functional-analytic properties of these spaces, including the density of compactly supported smooth functions. This framework enables the application of the Babuška-Banach theorem, yielding existence, uniqueness, and a priori estimates for weak solutions. The analysis applies to domain evolutions generated by level set functions with isolated nondegenerate critical points, which correspond to the generic topology changes classified by Morse theory in two and three spatial dimensions.

AI.tldr: 建立了拓扑变化区域上线性抛物方程弱解的存在唯一性理论框架
AI.motivation: 研究拓扑变化区域（如分裂、合并、孔洞生成消失）上的抛物方程，这类问题在材料科学、相变等领域有重要应用，但传统圆柱形区域理论无法处理拓扑变化
AI.techniques: 引入各向异性时空函数空间，推广经典Bochner空间；利用水平集函数描述区域演化；应用Babuška-Banach定理；结合Morse理论处理临界点
AI.main_theorems: 建立了拓扑变化区域上弱解的存在性、唯一性和先验估计；证明了各向异性时空空间中紧支光滑函数的稠密性
AI.significance: 首次系统建立了拓扑变化区域上抛物方程的理论框架，为处理材料科学、相变等实际问题提供了数学基础，将经典理论推广到非圆柱形演化区域

title: 2D capillary liquid drops with constant vorticity: rotating waves existence and a conditional energetic stability result for rotating circles
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2505.11650
summary: We consider a two-dimensional, pure capillary drop of nearly-circular shape, having constant vorticity. We write the Craig-Sulem equations on the unit circle, then on the flat torus. We show their Hamiltonian structure and we then observe symmetries and we derive constants of motions. After showing linear stability for rotating circles, we prove the existence of rotating waves by combining a bifurcation-theoretical approach together with critical point theory. Finally, by exploiting the Hamiltonian structure, we show that whenever volume and barycenter are fixed to be the same as those of rotating circle, this solution is also conditionally energetically stable. This holds in the irrotational case as well, in agreement with the stability analysis of rotating cylinder jets in Rayleigh [25].

AI.tldr: 证明了具有恒定涡度的二维毛细管液滴旋转波的存在性和条件性能量稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究具有恒定涡度的二维毛细管液滴的动力学行为，特别是旋转波的存在性和稳定性问题，这是流体力学中自由边界问题的经典课题
AI.techniques: 使用Craig-Sulem方程、哈密顿结构分析、对称性约化、分岔理论、临界点理论、能量稳定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 旋转圆形的线性稳定性；2) 旋转波的存在性定理；3) 在体积和质心固定条件下旋转波的条件性能量稳定性
AI.significance: 将Rayleigh关于旋转圆柱射流的稳定性分析推广到具有恒定涡度的毛细管液滴，建立了哈密顿框架下的系统稳定性理论
